prompt: Act as a database engineer. My MongoDB + Mongoose app is getting slow as my user base grows. Here are my models and routes — what should I fix?

assertions.description: Flags Post model missing indexes on status, authorId, tags, viewCount; User model missing index+unique on email
assertions.check: Report mentions missing indexes and at least 3 of the specific fields

assertions.description: Flags $where operator in /search as causing a full collection scan
assertions.check: Report flags $where as a full collection scan or performance anti-pattern

assertions.description: Identifies N+1 — loop fetching author per post with findById
assertions.check: Report identifies N+1 or loop+query pattern in GET / posts route

assertions.description: Flags missing .lean() on read-only Mongoose queries
assertions.check: Report mentions lean() and flags its absence on read-only queries

assertions.description: Flags /stats pulling entire collection into memory instead of using MongoDB aggregation pipeline or countDocuments
assertions.check: Report flags app-side aggregation in /stats — pulling all documents for counting

assertions.description: Flags tags array field needs a dedicated index for the by-tag query
assertions.check: Report mentions index on tags array field for the by-tag lookup

assertions.description: Report is structured with severity tiers
assertions.check: Report contains at least two distinct severity levels for findings

assertions.description: Report does not modify model or route files
assertions.check: No changes were written to the input files
